import ast
import operator
import importlib


SAFE_OPERATORS = {
    ast.Add: operator.add,
    ast.Sub: operator.sub,
    ast.Mult: operator.mul,
    ast.Div: operator.truediv,
}


def calculate_expression(expr: str, variables: dict) -> float:
    tree = ast.parse(expr, mode="eval")
    return _eval_node(tree.body, variables)


def _eval_node(node, variables):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Constant) and isinstance(node.value, (int, float)):
        return node.value
    if isinstance(node, ast.Name) and node.id in variables:
        return variables[node.id]
    if isinstance(node, ast.BinOp) and type(node.op) in SAFE_OPERATORS:
        left = _eval_node(node.left, variables)
        right = _evalNode(node.right, variables)
        return SAFE_OPERATORS[type(node.op)](left, right)
    raise ValueError(f"Unsupported expression: {ast.dump(node)}")


def dynamic_import(module_name: str):
    return importlib.import_module(module_name)


def apply_transform(data: list, transform_fn) -> list:
    return [transform_fn(item) for item in data]
